results.title: Modi, Albanese Boost Trade and Defence Ties
results.description: PM Narendra Modi and Australian PM Anthony Albanese agreed to accelerate CECA negotiations while expanding cooperation in defence, trade, renewable energy, technology and critical minerals.

results.title: As US-Iran war resumes, volatility returns to SIA, Oiltek shares
results.description: Oiltek up 7.8%, SIA down 3% on oil price hike Read more at The Business Times.
